mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auto_invest_triggers (auto_invest_stock_id, trigger_kind, condition_rate, action_type, action_amount, action_quantity, action_ratio, is_active, is_armed) VALUES (#{autoInvestStockId}, #{triggerKind}, #{conditionRate}, #{actionType}, #{actionAmount}, #{actionQuantity}, #{actionRatio}, TRUE, TRUE) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE condition_rate = VALUES(condition_rate), action_type = VALUES(action_type), action_amount = VALUES(action_amount), action_quantity = VALUES(action_quantity), action_ratio = VALUES(action_ratio), is_active = TRUE, is_armed = TRUE
mapper.select: SELECT id, auto_invest_stock_id, trigger_kind, condition_rate, action_type, action_amount, action_quantity, action_ratio, is_active, is_armed, last_fired_at, created_at, updated_at FROM auto_invest_triggers WHERE auto_invest_stock_id = #{autoInvestStockId} ORDER BY trigger_kind
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM auto_invest_triggers WHERE id = #{id} AND auto_invest_stock_id = #{autoInvestStockId}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.auto_invest_stock_id, t.trigger_kind, t.condition_rate, t.action_type, t.action_amount, t.action_quantity, t.action_ratio, t.is_active, t.is_armed, t.last_fired_at, t.created_at, t.updated_at, s.user_id, s.stock_code, s.market, s.account_id, s.currency FROM auto_invest_triggers t JOIN auto_invest_stocks s ON s.id = t.auto_invest_stock_id JOIN auto_invest_settings g ON g.user_id = s.user_id WHERE t.is_active = TRUE AND s.is_active = TRUE AND g.is_enabled = TRUE AND g.is_paused = FALSE AND s.market = #{market} ORDER BY t.id
